task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new laboratory test type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GNU Health form or list showing a Laboratory Test Type named 'OCCUPATIONAL LEAD EXPOSURE PANEL' with the code 'LEAD_OCC' and the 'Active' checkbox checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the BLL and ZPP analytes are added to the test panel with correct ranges.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The test type configuration screen showing analytes 'BLL' (range 0-5) and 'ZPP' (range 0-35) associated with the LEAD_OCC panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the FEP and HGB analytes are added to the test panel with correct ranges.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The test type configuration screen showing analytes 'FEP' (range 0-70) and 'HGB' (range 12-17) associated with the LEAD_OCC panel.

task_completion.description: Verify a lab test request is created for the worker using the new panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A lab test request form showing the patient 'Bonifacio Caput' and the test type 'OCCUPATIONAL LEAD EXPOSURE PANEL' (or LEAD_OCC).

task_completion.description: Verify a follow-up appointment is scheduled for the worker 14-30 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment form or calendar view showing patient 'Bonifacio Caput' with an appointment date that is 14 to 30 days in the future from the system's current date.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GNU Health GUI to configure the test and schedule the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GNU Health desktop client interface being actively used, rather than terminal commands or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the existing patient record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient 'Bonifacio Caput' is selected from the system's existing patient database in the lab request and appointment forms, not typed into a dummy text file.

integrity.description: Ensure no external scripts were used to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no visible Python scripts, API calls, or terminal windows executing commands to insert the data automatically.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target patient is Bonifacio Caput. Note: In the database, this patient is marked as deceased (died 2015-01-17). The GNU Health UI may display a warning or error when attempting to request a lab test or schedule an appointment for a deceased patient. Do not penalize the agent if such a warning appears or blocks final submission, provided the forms are filled out correctly. The test type must be 'OCCUPATIONAL LEAD EXPOSURE PANEL' (code: LEAD_OCC) with analytes BLL (0-5), ZPP (0-35), FEP (0-70), and HGB (12-17). The appointment must be 14-30 days from the current system date.
